Subject: Vacation Request Approval

Hi [Employee Name],

Thank you for submitting your vacation request. I am writing to confirm that your leave has been approved for the dates you selected.

Please ensure all your current projects are handed over to [Colleague Name] before you depart. Everything is covered on your end, so please enjoy some well-deserved time off to recharge.

We value your contributions to the team, and having you back refreshed will only benefit our collective goals. Once you return, please reconnect with us via email or messaging app if you need any updates.

Safe travels!

Best regards,

[Your Name]<|im_end|>

final_answer:
Subject: Vacation Request Approval

Hi [Employee Name],

Thank you for submitting your vacation request. I am writing to confirm that your leave has been approved for the dates you selected.

Please ensure all your current projects are handed over to [Colleague Name] before you depart. Everything is covered on your end, so please enjoy some well-deserved time off to recharge.

We value your contributions to the team, and having you back refreshed will only benefit our collective goals. Once you return, please reconnect with us via email or messaging app if you need any updates.

Safe travels!

Best regards,

[Your Name]<|im_end|>
